evidences.title: Solana Price Today | SOL to USD Live Price, Market Cap & Chart
evidences.content: $SOL just pulled a clean escape act. $9.41M net inflow hit fast, large buyers took control, and price pushed 4.58% above key EMAs like resistance was just a suggestion. Now shorts are sweating too with 86.5% of short whales underwater, a move above $91 can keep the squeeze alive toward $92.50. The funny part? Momentum still looks strong, but RSI is already screaming “bro, relax” at 87. So yes, bulls are partying, but don’t be shocked if SOL takes a breather near $93 before the next move. What keeps sentiment alive is bigger money still showing up. Weekly inflows around $17M plus MoonPay’s SOL support for AI wallet activity gives this run more fuel than just a quick hype candle. For now, $89 support matters. Lose that, and the meme gets less funny. evidences.title: Solana historical price trends: Market and candlestick chart data free ...
evidences.content: By design, the total supply of SOL will reach 621M. As of now, the circulating supply of SOL is approximately 570M. All prices shown on this page come from trusted data provider LBank. When reviewing your investments, it is recommended not to rely on a single data source, as values may differ between providers. Our historical Bitcoin price dataset includes 1-minute, 1-day, 1-week, and 1-month data (open/high/low/close/volume). These datasets have been rigorously tested to ensure consistency, integrity, and accuracy. The design is specifically for trading simulations and backtesting, available for free download and updated in real time. ## SOL historical data examples Here are some uses of SOL historical data in SOL trading Technical analysis: [...] How to analyze SOL candlestick chart data SOL candlestick charts display time on the horizontal axis and price data on the vertical axis, similar to line and bar charts. A candlestick may have two different colors: green or red. A green candle indicates a price increase during the considered period, while a red candle indicates a price decrease. The simple structure of candlestick charts can provide users with a wealth of information....
